subcodes.first_line: O thou spiritual leaf who art mindful of the remembrance of God! May the Lord of Signs preserve thee and turn thy heart unto the Concourse on high [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها الورقه الروحانیه المتذکره بذکر الله حفظک رب الایات وجهی قلبک الی الملا
subcodes.subjects: @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
